close_reason: Simplified to majority quorum and removed shard_tags
description:
## Goal
Stop assigning shard_tags to logs during initialization - tags are computed, not stored.

## File
`lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/initialization_phase.ex`

## Changes
```elixir
# Before: logs = Map.new(log_vacancies, &{&1, log_tags})
# After:  logs = Map.new(log_vacancies, &{&1, %{}})
```

Remove any log_tags computation/assignment. Shard-to-log mapping is now computed via consistent hashing when needed.
title: Remove shard_tags from InitializationPhase
